title: Death Wisp
description: Lets you fly around when dead to get your items easily!
body:
Death Wisp is a simple mod that allows you to fly around to find your items with ease.

Made in MCreator.
Needs no dependencies.

**So what does it do?**
When you respawn, you will be automatically put into spectator mode with reduced vision and speed. To exit spectator mode, just left click in the air- this will also clear you of all negative effects, but will reduce your hunger to half.



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
